RQVAE(
  (encoder): MLPLayers(
    (mlp_layers): Sequential(
      (0): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (1): Linear(in_features=768, out_features=512, bias=True)
      (2): ReLU()
      (3): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (4): Linear(in_features=512, out_features=256, bias=True)
      (5): ReLU()
      (6): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (7): Linear(in_features=256, out_features=128, bias=True)
      (8): ReLU()
      (9): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (10): Linear(in_features=128, out_features=64, bias=True)
      (11): ReLU()
      (12): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (13): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=32, bias=True)
    )
  )
  (rq): ResidualVectorQuantizer(
    (vq_layers): ModuleList(
      (0-2): 3 x VectorQuantizer(
        (embedding): Embedding(256, 32)
      )
    )
  )
  (decoder): MLPLayers(
    (mlp_layers): Sequential(
      (0): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=64, bias=True)
      (2): ReLU()
      (3): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)

      (8): ReLU()

      (10): Linear(in_features=256, out_features=512, bias=True)
      (11): ReLU()
      (12): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (13): Linear(in_features=512, out_features=768, bias=True)
    )
  )
